<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\TopK; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/topk.incrby/ * * Increase the score of an item in the data structure by increment. * Multiple items' score can be increased at once. * If an item enters the Top-K list, the item which is expelled is returned. */ class TOPKINCRBY extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'TOPK.INCRBY'; } }
